test.name: CAS_TEST_13 Add Cart with invalid data

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Add Cart
Evaluate
kw.msg: Evaluating expression "__import__('pymongo').MongoClient('mongodb+srv://admin:passer123@clusterqatestexamen.ju7prft.mongodb.net/?retryWrites=true&w=majority&appName=ClusterQaTestExamen').get_database('label1DB').get_collection('carts').insert_one({'userId': '1', 'date': '2023-07-28', 'products': [{'productId': 'invalid', 'quantity': 5}, {'productId': 2, 'quantity': 15}]})" failed: WriteError: Document failed validation, full error: {'index': 0, 'code': 121, 'errmsg': 'Document failed validation', 'errInfo': {'failingDocumentId': ObjectId('688a44c543b9caf9f838b5c6'), 'details': {'operatorName': '$jsonSchema', 'schemaRulesNotSatisfied': [{'operatorName': 'properties', 'propertiesNotSatisfied': [{'propertyName': 'userId', 'description': "L'userId est requis et doit être un entier", 'details': [{'operatorName': 'bsonType', 'specifiedAs': {'bsonType': 'int'}, 'reason': 'type did not match', 'consideredValue': '1', 'consideredType': 'string'}]}, {'propertyName': 'date', 'description': 'La date est requise', 'details': [{'operatorName': 'bsonType', 'specifiedAs': {'bsonType': 'date'}, 'reason': 'type did not match', 'consideredValue': '2023-07-28', 'consideredType': 'string'}]}, {'propertyName': 'products', 'description': 'Liste des produits', 'details': [{'operatorName': 'items', 'reason': 'At least one item did not match the sub-schema', 'itemIndex': 0, 'details': [{'operatorName': 'properties', 'propertiesNotSatisfied': [{'propertyName': 'productId', 'description': 'ID du produit requis', 'details': [{'operatorName': 'bsonType', 'specifiedAs': {'bsonType': 'int'}, 'reason': 'type did not match', 'consideredValue': 'invalid', 'consideredType': 'string'}]}]}]}]}]}, {'operatorName': 'required', 'specifiedAs': {'required': ['id', 'userId', 'products', 'date']}, 'missingProperties': ['id']}]}}}
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.
kw.status: Evaluating expression "__import__('pymongo').MongoClient('mongodb+srv://admin:passer123@clusterqatestexamen.ju7prft.mongodb.net/?retryWrites=true&w=majority&appName=ClusterQaTestExamen').get_database('label1DB').get_collection('carts').insert_one({'userId': '1', 'date': '2023-07-28', 'products': [{'productId': 'invalid', 'quantity': 5}, {'productId': 2, 'quantity': 15}]})" failed: WriteError: Document failed validation, full error: {'index': 0, 'code': 121, 'errmsg': 'Document failed validation', 'errInfo': {'failingDocumentId': ObjectId('688a44c543b9caf9f838b5c6'), 'details': {'operatorName': '$jsonSchema', 'schemaRulesNotSatisfied': [{'operatorName': 'properties', 'propertiesNotSatisfied': [{'propertyName': 'userId', 'description': "L'userId est requis et doit être un entier", 'details': [{'operatorName': 'bsonType', 'specifiedAs': {'bsonType': 'int'}, 'reason': 'type did not match', 'consideredValue': '1', 'consideredType': 'string'}]}, {'propertyName': 'date', 'description': 'La date est requise', 'details': [{'operatorName': 'bsonType', 'specifiedAs': {'bsonType': 'date'}, 'reason': 'type did not match', 'consideredValue': '2023-07-28', 'consideredType': 'string'}]}, {'propertyName': 'products', 'description': 'Liste des produits', 'details': [{'operatorName': 'items', 'reason': 'At least one item did not match the sub-schema', 'itemIndex': 0, 'details': [{'operatorName': 'properties', 'propertiesNotSatisfied': [{'propertyName': 'productId', 'description': 'ID du produit requis', 'details': [{'operatorName': 'bsonType', 'specifiedAs': {'bsonType': 'int'}, 'reason': 'type did not match', 'consideredValue': 'invalid', 'consideredType': 'string'}]}]}]}]}]}, {'operatorName': 'required', 'specifiedAs': {'required': ['id', 'userId', 'products', 'date']}, 'missingProperties': ['id']}]}}}

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.status: Evaluating expression "__import__('pymongo').MongoClient('mongodb+srv://admin:passer123@clusterqatestexamen.ju7prft.mongodb.net/?retryWrites=true&w=majority&appName=ClusterQaTestExamen').get_database('label1DB').get_collection('carts').insert_one({'userId': '1', 'date': '2023-07-28', 'products': [{'productId': 'invalid', 'quantity': 5}, {'productId': 2, 'quantity': 15}]})" failed: WriteError: Document failed validation, full error: {'index': 0, 'code': 121, 'errmsg': 'Document failed validation', 'errInfo': {'failingDocumentId': ObjectId('688a44c543b9caf9f838b5c6'), 'details': {'operatorName': '$jsonSchema', 'schemaRulesNotSatisfied': [{'operatorName': 'properties', 'propertiesNotSatisfied': [{'propertyName': 'userId', 'description': "L'userId est requis et doit être un entier", 'details': [{'operatorName': 'bsonType', 'specifiedAs': {'bsonType': 'int'}, 'reason': 'type did not match', 'consideredValue': '1', 'consideredType': 'string'}]}, {'propertyName': 'date', 'description': 'La date est requise', 'details': [{'operatorName': 'bsonType', 'specifiedAs': {'bsonType': 'date'}, 'reason': 'type did not match', 'consideredValue': '2023-07-28', 'consideredType': 'string'}]}, {'propertyName': 'products', 'description': 'Liste des produits', 'details': [{'operatorName': 'items', 'reason': 'At least one item did not match the sub-schema', 'itemIndex': 0, 'details': [{'operatorName': 'properties', 'propertiesNotSatisfied': [{'propertyName': 'productId', 'description': 'ID du produit requis', 'details': [{'operatorName': 'bsonType', 'specifiedAs': {'bsonType': 'int'}, 'reason': 'type did not match', 'consideredValue': 'invalid', 'consideredType': 'string'}]}]}]}]}]}, {'operatorName': 'required', 'specifiedAs': {'required': ['id', 'userId', 'products', 'date']}, 'missingProperties': ['id']}]}}}

test.status: Evaluating expression "__import__('pymongo').MongoClient('mongodb+srv://admin:passer123@clusterqatestexamen.ju7prft.mongodb.net/?retryWrites=true&w=majority&appName=ClusterQaTestExamen').get_database('label1DB').get_collection('carts').insert_one({'userId': '1', 'date': '2023-07-28', 'products': [{'productId': 'invalid', 'quantity': 5}, {'productId': 2, 'quantity': 15}]})" failed: WriteError: Document failed validation, full error: {'index': 0, 'code': 121, 'errmsg': 'Document failed validation', 'errInfo': {'failingDocumentId': ObjectId('688a44c543b9caf9f838b5c6'), 'details': {'operatorName': '$jsonSchema', 'schemaRulesNotSatisfied': [{'operatorName': 'properties', 'propertiesNotSatisfied': [{'propertyName': 'userId', 'description': "L'userId est requis et doit être un entier", 'details': [{'operatorName': 'bsonType', 'specifiedAs': {'bsonType': 'int'}, 'reason': 'type did not match', 'consideredValue': '1', 'consideredType': 'string'}]}, {'propertyName': 'date', 'description': 'La date est requise', 'details': [{'operatorName': 'bsonType', 'specifiedAs': {'bsonType': 'date'}, 'reason': 'type did not match', 'consideredValue': '2023-07-28', 'consideredType': 'string'}]}, {'propertyName': 'products', 'description': 'Liste des produits', 'details': [{'operatorName': 'items', 'reason': 'At least one item did not match the sub-schema', 'itemIndex': 0, 'details': [{'operatorName': 'properties', 'propertiesNotSatisfied': [{'propertyName': 'productId', 'description': 'ID du produit requis', 'details': [{'operatorName': 'bsonType', 'specifiedAs': {'bsonType': 'int'}, 'reason': 'type did not match', 'consideredValue': 'invalid', 'consideredType': 'string'}]}]}]}]}]}, {'operatorName': 'required', 'specifiedAs': {'required': ['id', 'userId', 'products', 'date']}, 'missingProperties': ['id']}]}}}
